summary: State of the Union excerpt in which Trump asks members to stand and show support for protecting American citizens and tells those who stay seated they 'should be ashamed,' intercut with audience reaction shots (e.g., Sen. Mark Kelly), and ending on a single color-graded, oval-vignette shot of an ICE/ERO officer with binoculars. The audio is the speech itself, not a song. Most of the footage is rostrum and reaction shots, with a brief closing image.
notable_text: ERO (officer vest); (spoken) "stand up and show your support"; "you should be ashamed of yourself"
